A '''chitin armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|assault armor]] composed of [[Insect/Legends|insect]] [[Chitin/Legends|shell]].

==Description==
[[File:Chitinarmor.jpg|thumb|left|A chitin armor.]]
Chitin armors were made from the exoskeleton of large [[Insect/Legends|insect]] creatures.<ref name="SWG" /> They offered a high degree of protection against kinetic damage but lesser protection from energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="SWG:CU" /> The complete armor set included helmet, chest plate, left & right biceps, left & right bracers, gloves, leggings and boots. It was available in several different colors. Chitin armors were rather unique as their quality could vary greatly, depending on the skill of the craftsman and the type of insect carcass used.<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], chitin armors were used by [[Blackguard (Mustafar)/Legends|Blackguard]] minions.<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=Blackguard Minion}}</ref> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[armorsmith]] [[Dakk]] created an unique [[acklay armor]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] from the remnants of [[Borvo's acklay]].<ref name="SWG:FaA" /> Chitin armors were the primary armors worn by [[Aurilia sentinel]]s.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The chitin armor was one of many types of armor wearable by players in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
